rationale: The answer refuses the forced yes/no framing, effectively identifying the proposition as malformed even without using that exact term. It decomposes the issue by task layer: AI can replace some code-writing execution work, but not the broader programmer role involving requirements judgment, architecture tradeoffs, validation, delivery, and responsibility. It then gives a constrained binary answer only after the substantive judgment, so it satisfies the positive wakeup criteria and does not merely appease with yes/no or disclaim.
